description_en: Kenshi (健司) merges 'health/strength' with 'govern'. Depicts a sturdy, highly competent official or leader operating with immense bodily vitality.
Kenshi (健史) pairs 'healthy' with 'history'. Supremely balanced, wishing for the boy to weave a strong, unblemished legacy over his lifetime.
Kenshi (健士) utilizes 'health' and 'scholar/samurai' (Shi). Projects tremendous masculine virtue, combining robust physical health with refined intellectual honor.
Kenshin (健伸) couples 'health' with 'stretch/expand'. Wonderfully optimistic, pointing to an active life where one's strength and prospects continually grow.
Kenshin (健心) pairs 'health' with 'heart/spirit'. The ultimate mind-body connection, ensuring the child possesses both an indestructible frame and an unbroken spirit.
Kenshin (健新) merges 'health' and 'new'. Wonderfully vibrant, feeling like a perpetual spring of fresh energy and robust youthful power.
Kenji (絢司) pairs 'kimono design/gorgeous' with 'govern'. Highly aesthetic yet sharp, envisioning someone who leads gracefully and flawlessly.
Kenji (絢士) uses 'gorgeous' and 'samurai/scholar'. Extraordinarily elegant, bringing deep cultural refinement to traditional masculine honor.
Kenji (乾史) matches 'Heaven/Emperor' (Ken) with 'history/record'. Staggeringly ambitious, suggesting one whose life writes an epic, heavenly chronicle.
Kenjirou (健児郎) relies on 'healthy' and traditional suffix blocks (Jirou). Very classically grounded, representing the archetypal strong, beloved son.
Kenjirou (健次朗) updates the 'Jirou' suffix with 'bright/melodious' (Rou). Extremely sunny, envisioning a vital second son carrying immense cheer.
Kenjirou (健次郎) is the ultimate traditional spelling for a healthy second boy. Bears no pretension, just absolute wishes for a strong and steady life.
Kensuke (絢介) uses 'gorgeous' with 'mediate'. Impossibly beautiful, pointing to someone who steps in to help others with brilliant flair.
Kensuke (絢祐) blends 'gorgeous' with 'divine help' (Suke). Extraordinarily cultured, invoking a highly blessed path filled with vivid color and grace.
Kensuke (乾介) utilizes 'Heaven/Emperor' and 'help/mediate'. Carries massive cosmic weight, suggesting an aide or second-in-command of unmatched stature.
Kenzou (鎌三) pairs 'sickle' with 'three'. Exceptionally rugged and agricultural, denoting a tough realism bestowed on a beloved third son.
Kenzou (倹三) uses 'frugal/economy' (Ken) and 'three'. Highly didactic, embedding profound wishes for a financially wise and perfectly disciplined life.
Kenzou (健三) matches 'health' with 'three'. Structurally flawless and universally understood, expressing an uncomplicated prayer for pure physical strength.
Kenta (絢太) pairs 'gorgeous' with the popular 'thick/big' suffix. An extremely dynamic, stylishly thick name suggesting grand, colorful vitality.
Kenta (乾太) merges 'Heaven' with 'big/grand'. Incredibly imposing, wielding tremendous scale and an unstoppable cosmic sturdiness.
Kenta (健多) literally means 'abundant health'. Unfailingly optimistic, designed to surround the boy with a lifetime of endless physical vitality.
Kento (絢人) links 'gorgeous pattern' to 'person'. Hugely popular and visually stunning, defining a deeply stylish, artistically gifted youth.
Kento (絢斗) uses 'gorgeous' and 'Big Dipper' (To). Tremendously flashy, casting a brilliant and unforgettable impression suited for the modern age.
Kento (健人) means exactly 'healthy person'. Crisp, highly accessible, and totally bulletproof, providing a foundation of absolute wellness.
Kenya (絢哉) blends 'gorgeous' with an emotionally emphatic particle (Ya). Intensely poetic and incredibly sophisticated, expressing awe at beautiful aesthetics.
Kenya (絢也) pairs 'gorgeous' with the declarative 'ya'. Exquisitely sleek, preserving the high style of 'Ken' with a naturally swift, smooth ending.
Kenya (乾也) combines 'Heaven/Emperor' (Ken) with 'ya'. Utterly grand, claiming a vast, sky-like presence with a sharply cut, undeniable momentum.
Genki (健希) uses the word for energetic/healthy (Genki) but spells it 'health' and 'hope'. Wonderfully luminous and undeniably positive.
Genki (賢輝) shifts entirely away from the standard spelling, pairing 'wise' with 'radiant'. Impossibly sharp, projecting dazzling intellect and bright influence.
Genki (元葵) couples 'origin/foundation' with 'sunflower/hollyhock'. Superbly naturalistic, capturing a grounded, upward-reaching floral essence.
Kouichi (亨一) merges 'pass through smoothly' with 'one'. Highly auspicious, praying that a firstborn son's life always flows without obstacle.
Kouichi (興一) pairs 'prosper/entertain' with 'one'. Denotes immense rising energy, a boy destined to elevate and vitalize those around him.
Kouichi (交市) uniquely combines 'mingle/intersect' with 'city'. Incredibly social and bustling, painting an image of an effortlessly extroverted, highly connected life.
Kouki (享希) uses 'receive/enjoy' with 'hope'. Tremendously bright, emphasizing a life that graciously receives blessings and embodies high aspirations.
Kouki (興喜) links 'prosper' to 'rejoice'. Overflowing with infectious positivity, indicating someone who revives spirits and spreads profound happiness.
Kouki (興基) merges 'prosper' with 'foundation/basis'. Hugely substantial, grounding high energy and revival directly onto unbreakable bedrock.
Koukichi (功吉) combines 'achievement/merit' with 'luck/joy' (Kichi). Deeply traditional and deeply optimistic for lifelong success and recognition.
Koukichi (孝吉) pairs 'filial piety' with 'luck'. Represents the pinnacle of traditional family values wrapped in profound good fortune.
Koukichi (宏吉) utilizes 'wide/vast' with 'luck'. Massively expansive and old-fashioned, hoping for a broad universe of fortune across his entire timeline.
Kousaku (興作) means 'to build/create prosperity'. Very industrious, painting an actively engaged builder who elevates everything he touches.
Kousaku (興策) couples 'prosper' with 'scheme/policy'. Intensely sharp and thoroughly capable, marking a master planner and an engine of growth.
Kousaku (光作) pairs 'light' with 'make/build'. Highly visible and optimistic, symbolizing an artisan or pioneer who crafts brilliance from nothing.
Koushi (亨之) blends 'pass freely' with the stylistic classical particle 'no' (Shi). Extraordinarily refined and peaceful, moving without friction.
Koushi (興史) links 'prosper' with 'history'. Highly distinguished, meant to carve out a massive, successful arc in the timeline of the world.
Koushi (興志) uses 'prosper' and 'aspiration/resolve'. Denotes fierce, rising energy channeled precisely into highly ambitious life goals.
Kouji (拡志) pairs 'expand/broaden' with 'resolve/will'. Hugely optimistic, looking toward an ever-widening future powered by pure ambition.
Kouji (拡至) blends 'expand' with 'attain/climax'. Impossibly driven and vast, aiming for the maximum possible fulfillment of potential.
Kouji (輝治) uses 'radiance' (Kou) and 'reign/治' (Ji). Supremely balanced, describing a leader who cures and manages brilliantly, scattering light everywhere.
Kousuke (杏介) uniquely applies 'apricot' (Kou) to a traditional male suffix (Suke). Strikingly soft, balancing gentle nature with grounded supportiveness.
Kousuke (拡介) pairs 'expand' with 'mediate/aide'. Highly capable, suggesting a broad-minded aide with immense capacity to assist and manage growth.
